chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 607 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.2382/2022 (U/A) 2. For orders on CMA No.2383/2022 (Ex./A) 3. For hearing of main case 30-05-2022 Mr. Waqar Ahmed Bozdar, Advocate for the Petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. Through this Petition, the Petitioner has impugned order dated 25-05-2022 passed by the Appellate Tribunal (Election), Naushahro Feroze in Election Appeal No.167 of 2022. The operative part of the order reads as under: “At the first instance respondent No.4 had submitted that he is not Muhammad Sajjan son of Mureed Qambrani but now he admits in court that he is the same person against whom there are dues of SEPCO department amounting to Rs.812312/-, therefore, the impugned order is maintained.” From perusal of the aforesaid observation, it appears that the Petitioner has admitted that he is a defaulter, and in this Constitutional jurisdiction in such election matters, this Court cannot examine this factual dispute. Accordingly, Petition being misconceived is hereby dismissed in limine. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
